audit_items.proof_trace: All dynamic allocations in nfp_net_main.c are correctly freed on every path. The probe function uses the standard Linux cascading error-label pattern (err_stop_app → err_free_irqs → err_free_vnics → err_clean_ddir → err_shared_buf_unreg → err_devlink_unreg → err_unmap), ensuring irq_entries, data vnics, ctrl vnic, memory-mapped areas, and pf->app are unwound in reverse order. Local eth_table allocations in nfp_net_refresh_port_table_sync and nfp_net_refresh_eth_port are freed via kfree before any early return.
